summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Wed Us CRM lead management system. Backend APIs working well (22/25 tests passed), frontend UI and core workflows functioning correctly. All major features tested including login, page navigation, lead cards, Log Response functionality, search, and category pages.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Team member login failing with 401 'Invalid email or password' for priya@wedus.com
flaky_endpoints.impact: Team members cannot login, only admin access working

ui_bugs.issue: Some navigation clicks intercepted by overlay, requiring force clicks
Filter dropdown not showing team member options

passed_tests: Dashboard loading with correct stats (12 total leads, 3 interested, 9 needs review)
Today page shows date and 0 follow-ups scheduled
This Week page navigation and display
Needs Review category page with 9 leads
Lead cards display company name, phone, city, calls count
Log Response button expands inline panel
Response dropdown with all response options
Notes, follow-up date, pipeline/category dropdowns in Log Response
Search functionality (filtered 9 leads to 1 when searching 'Royal')
WhatsApp and Instagram links in lead cards
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix team member authentication issue - priya@wedus.com login failing with 401 error. Check user seeding and password hashing. Also investigate Assigned To filter not populating team members.
success_percentage: Backend: 88% (22/25 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (minor UI issues only)
